culture-traits:occultEvil.displayName: Evil is a point of view

resources:manpower.description: Manpower is the number of human beings needed to supply one of these units. When a unit is destroyed in combat, the manpower inside of it dies as well.

static-modifiers:entrenchment.description: When an army is defending, each unit of Entrenchment greater than the enemy's Breakthrough corresponds to a +1% Damage Multiplier.
